text:
codex is the best AI coding product and we want to make it easy to try.

for the next 30 days, we are giving companies that want to try switching over two months of free codex usage.

i get some anxiety not using the smartest-available model/settings.

but sometimes i dont mind if it's really slow.

i wonder if we should focus more on a price/speed tradeoff relative to a price/intelligence tradeoff.
Brycent these videos are fantastic https://t.co/uR4Ed2B85s

RT @godofprompt: "Every complaint about Claude is secretly a workflow confession."

A FAANG engineer posted this on Reddit. 1,100 upvotes.…

RT @godofprompt: A Claude Code agent deleted 717 GB of a guy's Windows install with one backslash.

The command was supposed to remove a pr…

Most AI tools still die at the same place:

“Cool, here’s your code.”

Nobody wants code.

They want the thing live, usable, and working.

That’s why computer-use agents are going to eat basic coding assistants alive.

Want to make one of these with your pet?

The Kling template for making these is amazing - but it requires a reference photo of a human face 🫠

Luckily, there's a workaround. Just send a reference video to @heyglif with a photo of your pet(s) and ask to swap them in. https://t.co/TSERN3X5GT

@heyglif Link 👇

If you want the same look as the viral Kling videos - just ask it to use Kling!

It will generate a base image for you to start, and you can review + approve before animating.

https://t.co/eMQu3ktUgV
Let's take a moment to take in that this is Grok https://t.co/sDqi29aIVT

Keep those experiments coming! 
Time to boost our moods

Try this with your profile picture 

Prompt: hyper-realistic close-up of that object with large expressive realistic eyes added to it, the eyes are perfectly integrated into the object's form, big sparkling glossy eyes with detailed iris and reflections, cute yet slightly surreal https://t.co/LjAmEhXtRW
Try this prompt with your pets as well

Where do you get your best AI ideas?
